data.title: Group 1 Automotive missed Q4 estimated earnings by -9.0% with EPS of $8.49. Revenue up $34.00 million.
data.description: Automotive company Group 1 (NYSE: GPI) released its Q4 earnings on January 29, 2026, at 05:01 AM. They reported earnings that fell short of expectations, with an EPS of $8.49 compared to the estimated $9.37, marking a -9.0% miss. Revenue saw a $34.00 million increase from the previous year. This is part of a trend as the company has previously missed EPS expectations in their earnings. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global sports nutrition market to reach $108.1 billion by 2035 with a CAGR of 7.55%. Rising fitness trends drive growth.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in New York, it was reported that the Global Sports Nutrition Market is undergoing significant changes due to a rising global interest in physical fitness and performance-based nutrition. This trend is driven by the growing number of people engaging in sports and fitness activities globally. The market is seeing a surge in demand for sports nutrition products as consumers focus more on leading active lifestyles.

data.title: Dow beats Q4 earnings by 31%, reports EPS of $-0.34. Revenue down $945 million from last year. Full story - Benzinga.com.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Dow (NYSE: DOW) released its Q4 earnings, exceeding expectations significantly. The company reported an EPS of $-0.34, surpassing estimates of $-0.49 by 31.0%. However, revenue saw a decline of $945.00 million compared to the previous year. This performance marked a positive trend from the company's previous earnings report. The detailed article on this announcement can be found on Benzinga.com.

Report from Turkey: Turkish President Erdogan proposed to Trump in a phone call on Monday to hold a tripartite phone conversation with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian. Trump expressed willingness, but Pezeshkian has not yet responded so far.

data.title: Euna Solutions opens new US headquarters in Atlanta, celebrated with ribbon-cutting in Sandy Springs on Jan 28.
data.description: Euna Solutions®, a prominent provider of cloud solutions for the public sector, in collaboration with Sandy Springs, Georgia, the sixth-largest city in northern Fulton County, have revealed the inauguration of Euna's new U.S. headquarters in the Atlanta metro area. The significant event took place on January 28 and was celebrated with a ribbon-cutting ceremony at the freshly refurbished office located at 1155 Perimeter Center West. Euna Solutions CEO Tom Amburgey was accompanied by representatives from Sandy Springs for this momentous occasion.

data.title: EDITED launches AI-powered workflows for quick insights in retail decisions, reducing time to value.
data.description: In the bustling cities of New York and London, EDITED has unveiled groundbreaking AI-driven guided workflows designed to swiftly identify top insights. These innovative tools streamline processes, reducing the time to achieve value and facilitating more informed decision-making.

data.title: Zillow launches 'Someday Starts Today' campaign for all stages of home journey, debuts Feb. 1 during Grammy Awards broadcast. #Zillow #RealEstate.
data.description: On February 1, a new nationwide campaign will launch in conjunction with Zillow's advertising during the Grammy Awards broadcast. With housing choices becoming increasingly challenging, whether it be purchasing, leasing, or strategizing for the future, Zillow is transforming its brand presence. This initiative aims to assist individuals in navigating the complex housing market landscape. The campaign will feature a variety of strategies geared towards aiding individuals in making informed decisions regarding their housing needs.

data.title: WeaveGrid's expansion lets utilities manage load growth reliably & affordably with new DISCO capabilities.
data.description: WeaveGrid, a prominent provider of grid orchestration software for electric utilities, unveiled new Distribution Integrated System Capacity Orchestration capabilities on Jan. 29, 2026. This launch enables utilities to effectively handle load growth while maintaining reliability and cost-effectiveness. This enhancement aims to support the increasing demand for energy by optimizing system operations. This innovation marks a significant advancement in the industry and is expected to benefit utilities experiencing growth challenges.

data.title: Dow's Q4 2025 results show $9.5B net sales, down 9% YoY and 5% sequentially reflecting declines in all segments.
data.description: In Midland, Michigan on January 29, 2026, Dow (NYSE: DOW) reported financial highlights indicating net sales of $9.5 billion, showing a 9% decrease compared to the previous year. This decline was seen across all operating segments. Sequentially, net sales dropped by 5%, primarily driven by lower local prices and volumes due to regular seasonal fluctuations.

data.title: West Pharmaceutical to host conference call for Q4 and full-year 2025 results, announced on Jan 29, 2026. NYSE: WST's global leader in injectable drug solutions.
data.description: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc., a prominent company specializing in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, disclosed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 before the market opens on a specific date. This announcement was made in Exton, Pennsylvania, on Jan. 29, 2026. West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol WST, and is known for its global leadership in the sector. Investors and stakeholders are anticipated to closely monitor the figures revealed in this upcoming report for insights into the company's performance and trajectory.

data.title: XPRIZE Wildfire announces $750,000 awarded to finalist teams in $11M competition for autonomous wildfire response solutions.
data.description: A total of $750,000 has been granted to various autonomous teams to enhance their advancements in drone technology and artificial intelligence coordination. This initiative was announced in Oakland, California on January 29, 2026 by XPRIZE, a renowned organization known for creating and managing high-stakes incentive contests geared towards addressing significant global issues. The funding aims to drive innovative solutions in the integration of drones and AI, supporting the ongoing efforts of participating teams.

data.title: Honeywell reports Q4 2025 results with sales of $9.8B, up 6%, and adjusted EPS of $2.59. Orders up 23%, backlog over $37B.
data.description: Sales in the fourth quarter reached $9.8 billion, showing a 6% increase, while adjusted sales were reported at $10.1 billion, reflecting a 10% boost, with an 11% rise organically. Fourth-quarter GAAP Earnings Per Share stood at $0.49 and adjusted EPS at $2.59. Orders in the same quarter surged by 23% organically, contributing to a backlog exceeding $37 billion.
